```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement data labeling workflow and quality control"
---
# Data Labeling
## Task
Set up data labeling workflow with quality control.
## Requirements
1. Define labeling guidelines with examples. 2. Implement multi-annotator agreement.
3. Calculate inter-annotator agreement (Cohen's kappa, Fleiss' kappa). 4. Handle disagreements with adjudication.
5. Track labeling throughput and quality.
## Constraints
- Minimum 2 annotators per sample. Agreement > 0.8 kappa. Adjudicate disagreements.
## Success Criteria
- Labeling guidelines clear. Agreement measured. Quality > threshold. Throughput tracked.
```
